_note: Pre-migration localStorage fixture for src/utils/ost-store.ts (task 5.1). Reproduces the exact shipped shape before the D9 migration: no node ids, solutions as bare strings, no productId on records, plus the pre-multi-tree legacy key. Paste the three values below into localStorage on http://localhost:4321 to reproduce a returning visitor, then load /tools/opportunity-solution-tree/ and compare before/after.
_seed_snippet: for (const [k, v] of Object.entries(fixture.localStorage)) localStorage.setItem(k, JSON.stringify(v));

tree.outcome: Increase weekly active reps logging calls

opportunities.text: Reps forget to log a call right after it ends
solutions: Auto-draft a call note from the calendar event
Nudge in Slack 5 minutes after the meeting ends

opportunities.text: Logging a call takes too many clicks

ost-tree-builder.outcome: Legacy single tree from the pre-multi-tree builder

expected_after_one_load: ost-tree-builder is removed and wrapped into a third ost-trees-v1 record (migrateLegacy, unchanged behaviour)
every opportunity gains an opp_* id; every solution becomes { id: sol_*, text } with the same text and order
every record gains productId pointing at the seeded Donut CRM product (pm-products-v1 / pm-active-product-v1)
outcome, opportunity text/order and target flags are byte-identical to the fixture
ost-active-v1 keys and values are unchanged
